card_description: Sophia (Greek: "Wisdom") is a divine or mythological figure appearing in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. In the gnostic tradition, Sophia is fallen divine aeon whose error created the material world. PKD's theology heavily draws on Sophia as trapped divine wisdom. Appears in 2 Exegesis passages. Associated with dictionary terms: Sophia. Context: "Dick identifies himself and other "secret Christians" as "phagocytes" or "metabolic toxins" sent into the world-organism to dissolve the "malignant complex" that is the Black Iron Prison (BIP)."
